    id BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
    device_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    channel VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,

        REFERENCES devices(id)

groups.name: Recipes — CTEs
groups.description: Contextual multi-step recipes retained after direct SQL, CLI and database-command extraction.

functions.name: recursive hierarchy cte
functions.insertText:
WITH RECURSIVE tree AS (
    SELECT id, parent_id, name, 0 AS depth
    FROM categories
    WHERE parent_id IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT child.id,
           child.parent_id,
           child.name,
           parent.depth + 1
    FROM categories AS child
    JOIN tree AS parent
      ON child.parent_id = parent.id
)
SELECT *
FROM tree
ORDER BY depth, name;
functions.description: Traverse hierarchical data with a recursive CTE; syntax varies slightly by engine.
functions.longDescription:
Traverse hierarchical data with a recursive CTE; syntax varies slightly by engine.

Source : SQL relational concepts / PostgreSQL SQL tutorial / SQLite SQL language / MySQL SQL statements / SQL Server Transact-SQL documentation

functions.name: sql server recursive cte
functions.insertText:
WITH Tree AS (
    SELECT Id, ParentId, Name, 0 AS Depth
    FROM dbo.Categories
    WHERE ParentId IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT child.Id,
           child.ParentId,
           child.Name,
           parent.Depth + 1
    FROM dbo.Categories AS child
    JOIN Tree AS parent
      ON child.ParentId = parent.Id
)
SELECT *
FROM Tree;
functions.description: Traverse a hierarchy with a recursive CTE.
functions.longDescription:
Traverse a hierarchy with a recursive CTE.
